Item Class: Waystones
Rarity: Rare
Dread Course
Waystone (Tier 15)
--------
Revives Available: 0 (augmented)
Item Rarity: +25% (augmented)
Pack Size: +24% (augmented)
Monster Rarity: +19% (augmented)
Waystone Drop Chance: +95% (augmented)
--------
Item Level: 81
--------
{ Prefix Modifier "Fleeting" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters have 13(10-15)% increased Attack, Cast and Movement Speed
{ Prefix Modifier "Shattering" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters Break Armour equal to 26(25-30)% of Physical Damage dealt
{ Prefix Modifier "Destructive" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters have 229(200-240)% increased Critical Hit Chance
Monsters have +21(21-25)% Critical Damage Bonus
{ Suffix Modifier "of Buffering" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters gain 13(12-25)% of maximum Life as Extra maximum Energy Shield
{ Suffix Modifier "of Fatigue" (Tier: 1) }
Players have 27(30-25)% less Cooldown Recovery Rate
{ Suffix Modifier "of Evasion" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters are Evasive
--------
Can be used in a Map Device, allowing you to enter a Map. Waystones can only be used once.
